rows.label: bf10480100_0005
rows.name:
I entrust the rest to
you... my children...

rows.label: bf10480100_0020_h
rows.name: [ML:undisp ]I'm back.

rows.label: bf10480100_0020_s
rows.name: [ML:undisp ]I'm back.

rows.label: bf10480100_0030_h
rows.name: [ML:undisp ]Nice to meet you.

rows.label: bf10480100_0030_s
rows.name: [ML:undisp ]Nice to meet you.

rows.label: bf10480100_0040
rows.name: And thus, the boy met the girl.

rows.label: bf10480100_0050
rows.name:

rows.label: bf10480100_0061
rows.name: At the end of a long, long time

rows.label: bf10480100_0062
rows.name: The final day has passed

rows.label: bf10480100_0063
rows.name: I gently close my eyes

rows.label: bf10480100_0064
rows.name: held by fragments of shining memory

rows.label: bf10480100_0065
rows.name: Tracing my memories with you

rows.label: bf10480100_0066
rows.name: that alone is my wish...

rows.label: bf10480100_0067
rows.name: The final day you gave me

rows.label: bf10480100_0094
rows.name: was a fleeting spell

rows.label: bf10480100_0068
rows.name: Frozen time began to move

rows.label: bf10480100_0069
rows.name:
The night that should
never end broke into dawn

rows.label: bf10480100_0070
rows.name: I melt into the morning light...

rows.label: bf10480100_0071
rows.name: The last grain of the hourglass falls

rows.label: bf10480100_0072
rows.name: I slowly, quietly fall asleep

rows.label: bf10480100_0073
rows.name: Your figure slowly

rows.label: bf10480100_0074
rows.name: fades beyond the mist

rows.label: bf10480100_0075
rows.name: All my memories

rows.label: bf10480100_0095
rows.name: are still and silent, without a sound

rows.label: bf10480100_0076
rows.name: move slowly, as if in slow motion

rows.label: bf10480100_0077
rows.name: The final day you gave me

rows.label: bf10480100_0096
rows.name: was a fleeting spell

rows.label: bf10480100_0078
rows.name: Frozen time began to move

rows.label: bf10480100_0079
rows.name:
The night that should
never end broke into dawn

rows.label: bf10480100_0080
rows.name: I melt into the morning light...

rows.label: bf10480100_0081
rows.name: You gave me so many things

rows.label: bf10480100_0082
rows.name:
I wonder how much I was
able to give back to you

rows.label: bf10480100_0083
rows.name: If I was able to give even a little back

rows.label: bf10480100_0084
rows.name: If that made you smile...

rows.label: bf10480100_0085
rows.name: Even so, God...

rows.label: bf10480100_0086
rows.name:
If it is possible, please
turn back the hourglass

rows.label: bf10480100_0087
rows.name:
Just a little is enough,
just one more time

rows.label: bf10480100_0088
rows.name: Please give me time with that person

rows.label: bf10480100_0092
rows.name:
Just to tell my feelings
in a single word

rows.label: bf10480100_0089
rows.name:
I don't care what form it
takes, or where it may be

rows.label: bf10480100_0090
rows.name:
There is one last thing
I need to tell you

rows.label: bf10480100_0091
rows.name: these feelings of mine...

rows.label: bf10480100_0093
rows.name: to you...
